characters.name: Aaron Tyler
characters.description: Lee PaceplaysJaye'solder brother Aaron, the middle Tyler sibling. Aaron is currently living at home with Tyler parents,KarenandDarrin, while he works on his PhD in Comparative Religion. Aaron tends to be the most easy-going of the Tyler siblings. While he and Jaye bicker constantly, it is evident that they share a bond. Though he assumes she is insane from the get-go, Aaron is often eager to be there whenever Jaye turns to him for help. Aaron Tyler was originally supposed to be played by actorAdam Scott, who was available for the pilot, but not the series. When he became unavailable and Lee Pace was cast, Aaron's scene in the pilot had to be reshot.

characters.name: Alec "The Mouthbreather"
characters.description: Neil Graysonplays Alec, whoJayedubs “The Mouthbreather.” The Mouthbreather is Jaye’s boss at Wonderfalls, though the two started out as co-workers. They were both in running for the Assistant Manager position because the store’s manager, Peggy, was pregnant, when the position was given to the Mouthbreather, even though he was significantly younger than Jaye and still in high school, because he was more of a “people person.” Jaye resents his authority and generally does as she pleases at work.

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: Kari Matchettplay's Beth, who isThomas, the cute EPS guy's ex-wife. Beth first appears in Episode 1, "Wax Lion," when Thomas is injured and she is called because she's still his emergency contact. She returns whenSharonpursues a relationship with her on and off throughout the rest of the season. Episode 1, "Wax Lion" Episode 2, "Pink Flamingos"

characters.name: Bianca "Binky" Knowles
characters.description: Sarah Drewplays Bianca "Binky" Knowles in Episode 4, "Karma Chameleon."Jayemeets Binky as a troubled drifter at the beginning of the episode, but we quickly learn that Binky is not what she appears... especially since she happens to appear more and more like Jaye as time goes on! Episode 3, "Karma Chameleon"

characters.name: Darrin Tyler
characters.description: William Sadlerplays Darrin, the patriarch of the Tyler clan, father toSharon,Aaron, andJaye, and husband toKaren. He is a respected surgeon and is active in the local conservative political scene, which he and Sharon enjoy participating in together. Though set in his ways and highly opinionated, Darrin is a loving father and husband and is involved in the lives of all of his family members. He is particularly concerned about youngest, Jaye, who he feels is not living up to her potential.

characters.name: Fat Pat
characters.description: Eddie Kaye ThomasplaysJaye'selusive neighbor, "Fat Pat," in Episode 6, "Muffin Buffalo." Fat Pat has lived as a recluse in his trailer for years, but lately he's been working out and watching his diet, and he's set a goal weight for himself. He's almost there when Jaye interrupts his process. When he decides to fall off the wagon,Marianne Mariecomes along with a plate of muffins to help him dive over the side... Episode 6, "Muffin Buffalo"

characters.name: Father Joe Schofield
characters.description: Aidan Devineplays Father Joe Schofield, the Priest who looks like an Irish Johnny Cash in Episode 4, "Wound-Up Penguin." Father Schofield originally shows up in Niagara Falls in order to bringSister Katrinaback to her convent. His visit ends up having life-changing implications for him, though. Episode 4, "Wound-Up Penguin"

characters.name: Gretchen Speck-Horowitz
characters.description: Chelan Simmonsplays Gretchen Speck-Horowitz, one ofJaye'sformer high school classmates, and not someone with whom she had a friendly relationship as a teenager. Gretchen joins the cast ofWonderfallsprimarily in Episode 2, "Pink Flamingos," when she goes overboard while trying to get Jaye involved in their 6 ½ year high school reunion. From there, things between Gretchen and Jaye only go downhill. Gretchen makes an appearance in the Hannibal episode, "Amuse-Bouche". She is now divorced and has diabetes.

characters.name: Heidi Socket Gotts
characters.description: Jewell Staitplays Heidi Socket-Gotts,Eric’sslightly mad wife, who arrives back in Niagara Falls during Episode 9, “Safety Canary,” in an attempt to get Eric back. Almost immediately, she recognisesJayeas a viable threat, and she begins a manipulative strategy geared toward defaming Jaye and at the same time returning herself with Eric to the honeymoon suite at the same hotel that ruined their marriage, where they just happen to run into the same bellman who ruined their marriage. Heidi spends the rest of the series slathering herself all over Niagara Falls, testing Eric and making Jaye miserable. In the pilot episode, Heidi hadn't been cast yet, so the walk-on, walk-off role was played by day-actress, Corry Carpf.

characters.name: Heidi Socket Gotts
characters.description: Jewell Staitplays Heidi Socket-Gotts,Eric’sslightly mad wife, who arrives back in Niagara Falls during Episode 9, “Safety Canary,” in an attempt to get Eric back. Heidi spends the rest of the series slathering herself all over Niagara Falls, testing Eric and making Jaye miserable. In the pilot episode, Heidi hadn't been cast yet, so the walk-on, walk-off role was played by day-actress, Corry Carpf.

characters.name: Jaye Tyler
characters.description: Caroline Dhavernasstars as Jaye Tyler, a 24 year-old recent graduate ofBrown University. Jaye lives in a trailer park in Niagara Falls, where she works part-time at Wonderfalls, a local gift emporium. She spends a large chunk of time avoiding her loving, albeit overbearing, parents, and she does this by hanging out at a local bar, The Barrel. Jaye's mundane and predictable life takes a turn for the extraordinary when she begins to be visited by various "muses," which take the form of everyday objects with animal faces. Jaye's goal in life of maintaining a detatched disdainfulness from the world is threatened when these muses begin to deliver her with various ultimata. Jaye's family includes her older sister,Sharon(Katie Finneran), who is a successful and ambitious immigration attorney, and an older brotherAaron(Lee Pace), who is working on a PhD in Comparative Religion. Their mother isKaren(Diana Scarwid), a successful best-selling author, and their father isDarrin(William Sadler), a well-known and highly-respected surgeon. Jaye's family and her interactions with them make up a fair amount of the show's plot. Mahandra McGinty(Tracie Thoms) is Jaye's best friend. The two have been friends since grade school, and Mahandra works at Jaye's watering-hole-of-choice, The Barrel. Also employed at The Barrel is bartenderEric Gotts(Tyron Leitso), who manages to appeal to Jaye's somewhat prickly soft side.

characters.name: Karen Tyler
characters.description: Diana Scarwidplays Karen Tyler, wife toDarrinand mother toSharon,Aaron, andJaye. Karen is a popular and successful author of several bestselling travelogues. Karen is deeply devoted to her family, though her concern often manifests itself as nosiness or meddling. She is worried about her youngest, Jaye, who, like Darrin, she feels is not striving for her potential. This causes her to pay more attention to Jaye’s personal life than Jaye would like, putting a good deal of stress on their relationship. Though the two of them spend a good deal of time bickering, it becomes evident that Jaye and Karen share a deep and abiding love for each other.

characters.name: Katya
characters.description: Magdalena Alexander plays Katya in Episode 8, "Lovesick Ass." Katya is a Russian mail-order bride purchased by 13 year-old Peter Johnson. Katya finds herself stuck in Niagara Falls, in need of "a bigger Peter." AsJayeandErictry to help Katya sort her situation out, Katya finds herself in the middle of several different love triangles. Episode 8, "Lovesick Ass"

characters.name: Katya

characters.name: Mahandra McGinty
characters.description: Tracie Thomsplays Mahandra McGinty, who’s beenJaye’sBFF since they were wee kiddies. Mahandra works as a waitress at The Barrel, and has a close, familial relationship with the entire Tyler family, which becomes somewhat awkward for her later on in the season when she andAaronbecome secret boyfriend and girlfriend. Mahandra spends the entire series unaware of Jaye’s situation with the muses, though Jaye continuously drops very frank, offhand comments to her about what is happening. Mahandra always thinks that Jaye is joking and gets irritated with her for it.Kerry Washingtonwas originally cast as Mahandra, but was unable to continue shooting past the pilot.

characters.name: Marianne Marie Beattle
characters.description: Beth Grantplays Marianne Marie Beattle in Episode 6, "Muffin Buffalo." Marianne Marie lives inJaye'strailer park, and her goal in life is to start a fat-free muffin company called "Muffin Buffalo." The only problem is that she doesn't have the cash to make more than one last batch of muffins, and she's waiting on her lost disability checks, which Jaye's muses have told her to hide from Marianne... Episode 6, "Muffin Buffalo"

characters.name: Millie Marcus
characters.description: In Episode 7, "Barrel Bear," the late, greatRue McClanahanplays Millie Marcus, the first woman to have gone over Niagara Falls in a barrel.Mahandrabecomes infatuated by the ideal of Millie, and plans to hold rallies and book-signings for her... that is, until Vivian Caldwell, therealfirst woman to ever go over Niagara Falls in a barrel, shows up! Episode 7, "Barrel Bear"

characters.name: Millie Marcus
characters.description: In Episode 7, "Barrel Bear," the late, greatRue McClanahanplays Millie Marcus, the first woman to have gone over Niagara Falls in a barrel.Mahandrabecomes infatuated by the ideal of Millie, and plans to hold rallies and book-signings for her... that is, until Vivian Caldwell, therealfirst woman to ever go over Niagara Falls in a barrel, shows up! Episode 7, "Barrel Bear"

characters.name: Sharon Tyler
characters.description: Katie FinneranplaysJaye's sister Sharon, the oldest of the Tyler siblings. Sharon is a successful and ambitious immigration attorney, and ends up being an unwilling participant in many of Jaye's schemes, particularly those that involve legal counsel. Sharon appears to be everything that Jaye isn't: goal- and career-oriented, the recipient of their parents' approval, extremely high-strung, and with very little enjoyment in life. Sharon has a secret, though, which Jaye discovers in Episode 1, Wax Lion: Sharon is a closet lesbian. The secret ends up drawing Jaye and Sharon closer.

characters.name: Sharon Tyler

characters.name: Sister Katrina
characters.description: Carrie Prestonplays Sister Katrina, a nun struggling with the deeper concepts of life, faith, and cheese in Episode 4, "Wound-Up Penguin." Sister Katrina is a nun on the run, hiding in a barrel in The Barrel whenJayeandEricfirst meet her. From there, she takes them on quite a journey as she seeks to exorcise the muses from Jaye. Episode 4, "Wound-Up Penguin"

characters.name: Thomas the "Cute EPS Guy"
characters.description: Gabriel Hoganplays Thomas, the "cute EPS guy." Thomas is featured mainly in Episode 1, "Wax Lion," in which he attempts to dateSharonand Sharon attempts to date Thomas's ex-wife, Beth. Episode 1, "Wax Lion" Episode 2, "Pink Flamingos"

characters.name: Thomas the "Cute EPS Guy"
characters.description: Gabriel Hoganplays Thomas, the "cute EPS guy." Thomas is featured mainly in Episode 1, "Wax Lion," in which he attempts to dateSharonand Sharon attempts to date Thomas's ex-wife, Beth. Episode 1, "Wax Lion" Episode 2, "Pink Flamingos"

characters.name: Vivian Caldwell
characters.description: Louise Fletcherplays Vivian Caldwell in Episode 7, "Barrel Bear." Vivian is the woman who actually went over Niagara Falls in a barrel and lived, before being duped by her then-boyfriend andMillie Marcus. In the meantime, Vivian has been living in seclusion in the backwoods of Niagara Falls, nursing a grudge and biding her time. Episode 7, "Barrel Bear"

characters.name: Yvette LaJimodiere/Cindy Bradly
characters.description: Audrey Wasilewskiplays Yvette LaJimodiere, the Tylers' housekeeper, who we meet in Episode 5, "Crime Dog," as she is being deported to her native Canada. Unbeknownst to the Tylers, Yvette has been an illegal alien for the past twenty years, andJayeandAaronwill take a trip across the border in an attempt to bring her home. Also unbeknownst to the Tylers, her name isn't really Yvette LaJimodiere... It's Cindy Bradley! Cindy ran away from her parents' home when she was just out of high school because they were distant and unaffectionate. She was closer with their housekeeper, who is also called Yvette, than she was with her parents. After she came to America, she found employment with the Tyler family. Episode 5, "Crime Dog"
